Buy cheap · Transform · Compound

Millions of small, profitable
businesses already have
customers, revenue, and
staying power.

They just run on messy, manual operations that were never worth fixing before.

Now, improving them is cheap enough, fast enough, and valuable enough to matter.
6M

US small businesses will change hands by 2035 as owners retire

1M+

viable, cash-flowing candidates — $5T in enterprise value

<1 in 3

owners have a documented succession plan

Source: McKinsey Institute for Economic Mobility, 2026.

The opportunity is already proven

The smartest money just started buying services businesses to transform them with AI.

The Players

Bending Spoons · General Catalyst · Thrive · 8VC · Lightspeed · Khosla.

The Prize

$16T services economy. 16x bigger than software.

The Wedge

They run it from the US on huge deals. We buy US businesses and run them with LATAM talent + AI, from day one.

Capital committed to AI roll-ups, cumulative across 2025
Sources: General Catalyst HV (2025), Thrive Capital AI Services Fund (Apr 2025), OpenAI operator stake (Dec 2025). Stanford Search Fund Study, 2024.
What Vorena is

We acquire profitable businesses and transform them with technology we build.

ACQUIRE

Profitable companies, bought at a low multiple.

OPERATE

AI agents and LATAM talent run them.

GROW

Margins expand, value compounds.

COMPOUND

Hold and grow the value. Sell only when it's strategic.

The engine: AI agents and nearshore LATAM talent transforming, from day one.

We buy a business that runs on people. We build one that runs on technology.

vorenaOS
One system runs Vorena. Every cycle makes it sharper.
SOURCY · THE DEAL SCOUT AGENT · LIVE
  • Thesis in. Sector, geography, size, margin floors — Vorena's criteria, encoded.
  • Agent runs. Scans the market and scores every target against the thesis.
  • Pipeline out. A prioritized target list, with the rationale behind every score.
  • Loop closes. Every rejection lands in the data bank — sourcing gets smarter.
Open Sourcy ↗
Agents do the repeatable work People make the judgment calls The bank remembers everything
Distribution

Everyone will have AI. Not everyone has distribution.

Transforming with AI is step one — then the company has to grow. Distribution is the scarce asset now.

❝  Our distribution bet from day one: media-for-equity.

Creators take upside instead of fees. We buy it back as they grow us. Their leverage becomes ours.

$37B
creator ad spend, 2025
26%
YoY, ~4x the media industry
~50%
of buyers call it a must-buy
One network. Every company. Compounding with every deal.

Structure

Liquidity

You don't wait for one big exit.

The default

Hold & Compound

We keep the companies and grow them with tech. Value builds inside the holding.

Your liquidity path

Secondaries

Sell your position to new investors at each step-up.

Only when it's right

Strategic Sales

An exit is an offer we accept — never a deadline we chase.

Comparable

Bending Spoons has never sold a company. Its investors get liquidity through secondaries at every round — exactly our model.

$11Bvaluation, 2025
0companies sold
Every roundsecondaries
We compound like the best holding companies. Liquidity is a consequence of operating well — not a forced exit.
Pipeline

Two live deals, both in the thesis.

bycrawford.com

BY CRAWFORDIn review

  • Squarespace web design agency · UK · 8 years · 700+ sites · Enterprise Partner
  • Revenue $650K · Profit $330K · Margin 51%
  • Entry: 2.7x profit / 1.4x revenue · Asking $900K
  • Includes $700K pipeline + YouTube audience
accreditationtraining.org

ACCREDITATION TRAININGIn review

  • B2B accreditation consulting · US (Wyoming) · 3 years · 100% delegated · zero debt
  • Revenue $1.08M TTM · Profit ~$715K · Margin 66%
  • Entry: 1.4x profit / 0.9x revenue · 9.4x ROAS · Asking $989K
Both deals are in active review. The moment the raise closes, we negotiate.
